Title: Verify DashboardActivity is drawn correctly
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that the DashboardActivity is displayed
3. Check that the BrowserLayout, navigationView, and toolbar are present

Title: Verify MainActivity onCreate() method
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that the MainActivity is created

Title: Verify SignInActivity onCreate() method
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that the SignInActivity is created

Title: Verify UserListActivity onCreate() method
Test Steps:
1. Launch the application
2. Verify that the UserListActivity is created

Title: Verify Home page weather display
Preconditions: User is on the Home page
Test Steps:
1. Open the Home page
2. Verify that the local weather is displayed

Title: Verify Home page zoom in functionality
Preconditions: User is on the Home page
Test Steps:
1. Open the Home page
2. Click on the zoom in button
3. Verify that the weather information is zoomed in
Expected Result: Weather information is zoomed in correctly

Title: Verify Home page search functionality
Preconditions: User is on the Home page
Test Steps:
1. Open the Home page
2. Enter a location name in the search bar
3. Click on the search button
4. Verify that the weather information for the entered location is displayed
Expected Result: Weather information for the entered location is displayed correctly

Title: Verify trekking route selection
Preconditions: User is on the Trekking page
Test Steps:
1. Open the Trekking page
2. Select a province
3. Select a route within the selected province
4. Verify that the selected route is displayed

Title: Verify weather data request and display
Preconditions: User is on the Weather page
Test Steps:
1. Open the Weather page
2. Verify that the weather data is requested and displayed
Expected Result: Weather data is requested and displayed correctly

Title: Verify health-related data request and display
Preconditions: User is on the Health page
Test Steps:
1. Open the Health page
2. Verify that the health-related data is requested and displayed
Expected Result: Health-related data is requested and displayed correctly
